title: CloudStack Vendor NDA - Compliance Review
body:
CLOUDSTACK VENDOR NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
COMPLIANCE REVIEW
Document ID: policy_cloudstack_nda_review_001
Date: March 1, 2026

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
This compliance review evaluates TechCorp's proposed vendor Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) with CloudStack for the planned integration of CloudStack infrastructure services. The review confirms adherence to TechCorp's standard compliance framework and identifies the key confidentiality obligations, term duration, and protective provisions required for this integration.

CLAUSE VERIFICATION AGAINST TEMPLATE_POLICY_V1
All material clauses in the CloudStack vendor NDA have been verified against template_policy_v1 and confirmed to contain standard, approved language:

1. Confidential Information Definition: COMPLIANT. The NDA properly defines Confidential Information to include all information disclosed by either party relating to the integration project, including technical specifications, system designs, access credentials, performance data, and pricing structures. The definition excludes information that: (a) is already in the public domain; (b) was independently developed without reference to the Confidential Information; (c) is rightfully received from a third party without restriction; or (d) is required to be disclosed by law.

2. Permitted Use and Restrictions: COMPLIANT. The NDA limits use of Confidential Information solely to the Purpose: evaluating and implementing the CloudStack integration. Recipient agrees to restrict access to employees, contractors, and advisors with a legitimate need-to-know and who are bound by equivalent confidentiality obligations. This language aligns with template_policy_v1 Section 3.2.

3. Duty of Care: COMPLIANT. Both parties commit to protecting Confidential Information with the same degree of care used to protect their own confidential information, but no less than reasonable care. This meets the standard threshold established in template_policy_v1 Section 4.1.
